data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Service and provider restrictions', but the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or validations related to this requirement. The linked use cases and prior step evidence do not demonstrate how service and provider restrictions are implemented or enforced within the system. Therefore, there is a clear gap in meeting this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of service and provider restrictions being validated or enforced.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
